notes: v0.16.90 — ROOT CAUSE of the v0.16.78-89 empty-arena bug found and fixed. mini_boss.gd line 172 had an orphaned call to `_detach_turrets()` left over from the pre-v0.16.77 TURRET design (replaced by PRISM CORE which doesn't detach). That call produced a parse error which broke mini_boss.gd compile, cascaded to game.gd failing to load, and left every spawned MiniBoss as an empty unscripted Node — visible as empty arena. Removed the dead call. Spawn ctor back to simple `MiniBossScript.new()` — _ready now runs, kind / colors / HP / drones initialise properly. Diag strip + console spawn print removed. Windows only.
